description_long: This is a modern three-seater sofa with a white, subtly patterned base and armrests, paired with vibrant red seat and back cushions. The sofa features three individual seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which appear plush and slightly irregular in shape, suggesting a soft, comfortable seating experience. Two red throw pillows are placed asymmetrically on the left and right seats, adding a touch of casual comfort. The armrests are straight, boxy, and extend slightly beyond the seat cushions, providing a geometric, contemporary look. The sofa stands on four black, block-style legs, which are positioned at the corners and slightly splayed for stability. The upholstery on the base and arms displays a subtle floral or starburst pattern, contrasting with the smooth, solid red of the cushions.
description: A modern three-seater sofa with a white patterned base, red cushions, and black block legs, featuring two red throw pillows for added comfort.
description_view_0: Front view showing three red seat and back cushions, two red throw pillows, and the patterned white base with black legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the cushions, and the straight armrest profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous patterned white backrest and the black legs, with no cushions visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the armrest, cushion thickness, and the placement of a throw pillow on the seat.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual red seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all loose and uniform in size, with two additional loose throw pillows placed asymmetrically.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at seat height, fully upholstered in patterned white fabric, with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four black block-style legs, positioned at each corner, slightly splayed outward, with a simple, exposed design and no visible texture.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest segmented into three sections, each with a loose red cushion, continuous in structure with no tufting or channeling.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Base and armrests feature a subtle floral or starburst pattern in white, while the cushions and pillows are solid red with a smooth, matte texture.
